Salah Zakaria._note: birth_country had defaulted to Qatar (his nation) with no source; French Wikipedia's own article contradicts itself — infobox links 'Ach-Charqiya (Égypte)' but the prose says 'né ... à Ach-Charqiya en Arabie saoudite'. English Wikipedia has no place of birth at all. Ach-Charqiya/Ash-Sharqiyah names a real place in both Egypt (Sharqia Governorate) and Saudi Arabia (Eastern Province) — genuinely ambiguous. Using Saudi Arabia's Eastern Province per user decision on 2026-07-18 (prose repeated 'Arabie saoudite'; also geographically plausible for a Qatar international).
